message:
test(fuzz): add FrankenFuse ioctl dispatcher fuzz target

Adds structure-aware libFuzzer coverage for the FUSE ioctl surface
without needing a live kernel mount, driving the real argument parser
and backend routing from userspace via a new narrow hook on
FrankenFuse.

- crates/ffs-fuse/src/lib.rs: new `#[doc(hidden)]`
  `dispatch_ioctl_for_fuzzing(caller_pid, ino, fh, cmd, in_data,
  out_size)` method on FrankenFuse. Delegates to the existing
  `dispatch_ioctl` and unwraps the IoctlResult into a
  `std::result::Result<Vec<u8>, c_int>` so harnesses can observe
  either the raw reply payload or the errno that FUSE would hand
  back to the kernel. Mirrors the kernel contract exactly; no
  change to the live mount path.

- fuzz/Cargo.toml: register `fuzz_ioctl_dispatch` as a new [[bin]]
  target next to the existing `fuzz_openfs_recovery`, and add
  `[dependencies.ffs-fuse]` so the fuzz crate can build the
  harness against FrankenFuse directly.

- fuzz/fuzz_targets/fuzz_ioctl_dispatch.rs (672 LOC): new
  libfuzzer_sys target driving the full known ioctl opcode set we
  support — FS_IOC_FIEMAP, EXT4_IOC_GETFLAGS, EXT4_IOC_SETFLAGS,
  EXT4_IOC_GETVERSION, EXT4_IOC_SETVERSION, FS_IOC_GET_ENCRYPTION_
  POLICY, FS_IOC_GET_ENCRYPTION_POLICY_EX, and friends. Uses a
  512-byte bounded input with crc32c checksum prefix to stabilise
  corpus reproduction, constructs an in-memory FsOps backend
  implementing the minimal InodeAttr / DirEntry / FiemapExtent /
  FileType / RequestScope surface, then calls
  dispatch_ioctl_for_fuzzing with fuzzer-supplied (caller_pid, ino,
  fh, cmd, in_data, out_size) tuples and asserts the dispatcher
  either returns Ok(Vec<u8>) whose length fits out_size or
  Err(errno) where errno is one of the negated errno values the
  kernel will accept — never panics, overflows, or returns unsized
  data.

No live-mount behaviour change. The fuzz hook is intentionally
hidden from docs and only reachable through the fuzz crate.

files.patch:
@@ -17,6 +17,9 @@ path = "../crates/ffs-block"
 [dependencies.ffs-error]
 path = "../crates/ffs-error"
 
+[dependencies.ffs-fuse]
+path = "../crates/ffs-fuse"
+
 [dependencies.ffs-ondisk]
 path = "../crates/ffs-ondisk"
 
@@ -130,3 +133,8 @@ doc = false
 name = "fuzz_openfs_recovery"
 path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_openfs_recovery.rs"
 doc = false
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_ioctl_dispatch"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_ioctl_dispatch.rs"
+doc = false
